name: Baioli Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender jar, place 4 to 6 cloves of fresh, peeled garlic.
2. Add 2 egg yolks, 3 tablespoons of lemon juice, 1 tablespoon of Dijon-style mustard, and 1/2 teaspoon of salt.
3. Cover the blender and blend until smooth.
4. With the blender running, slowly pour in 1 cup of olive oil in a thin stream.
5. Continue blending with the cover off to emulsify the mixture.
6. Once finished, turn off the blender and scrape down the sides.
7. Adjust seasoning as needed.
8. Add 1/2 cup of fresh basil leaves and blend briefly until coarsely chopped.
